content.title: Cursor Deep Dive
content.description: Go beyond the basics — master Chat, Inline Edit, Composer, Tab completion, Cursor Rules, and advanced AI-assisted workflows

content.title: Claude Code
content.description: Introduction to Anthropic's CLI-based AI coding agent — terminal-native, agentic, and built for real engineering workflows

content.title: RAG Fundamentals
content.description: Build retrieval-augmented generation pipelines from scratch — load documents, chunk text, create embeddings, store vectors, and generate grounded answers

content.title: Prompt Engineering
content.description: Go beyond tips and tricks to engineer reliable, testable prompts that produce consistent results across system prompts, few-shot patterns, structured output, and chain-of-thought reasoning

content.title: How AI APIs Work
content.description: Understand the anatomy of AI API calls, make your first requests to Claude and OpenAI, and learn to manage keys, tokens, and costs like a professional

content.title: Evaluation and Observability
content.description: The article most AI tutorials skip — how to systematically test your AI applications, build eval suites, track costs, and monitor production behavior

content.title: Build an Agent
content.description: Capstone project — build a personal assistant agent from scratch with file I/O, code execution, web search, and proper error handling

content.title: Build a Chatbot
content.description: Build a real conversational AI application with multi-turn memory, streaming responses, and a web interface you can share with anyone

content.title: Agents and Tool Use
content.description: Understand AI agents that take actions in the world — define tools as JSON schemas, let the model decide when to call them, and build your first agentic loop

content.title: What Is Programming? Code, Languages, and How Computers Think
content.description: Understand what code actually is, why programming languages exist, why Python is the go-to for AI, and what it means to run a program

content.title: What Is AI? The Real Story
content.description: Understand what artificial intelligence actually is, how it's used today, and why applied AI engineering is one of the most exciting career paths you can choose

content.title: Setting Up Cursor: Your AI-Powered Workspace
content.description: Download, install, and configure Cursor — the AI-native code editor that will be your primary tool throughout this curriculum

content.title: Reading and Writing Data
content.description: Work with files, CSV, JSON, and live APIs in Python — the skills you need before connecting to AI services

content.title: Python Through AI: Learn by Reading, Not Memorizing
content.description: Learn Python fundamentals the modern way — give AI a task, read what it writes, understand the patterns, and modify the code yourself

content.title: Navigating an IDE: Finding Your Way Around Cursor
content.description: Learn the layout of your code editor — the file explorer, editor area, terminal, and essential keyboard shortcuts that make you fast

content.title: Git Basics: Saving Snapshots of Your Work
content.description: Learn version control with Git and GitHub — track changes, write meaningful commits, and push your code to the cloud

content.title: Your First Conversation with AI in Cursor
content.description: Learn to use Cursor's AI features — chat, inline editing, and the composer — to write code by having a conversation instead of typing it from memory

content.title: Files, Folders, and the Terminal
content.description: Understand how your computer organizes files, navigate with the command line, and run Python scripts from the terminal

content.title: Build Your First Script
content.description: Combine everything you've learned into a real, useful Python project — planned with AI, built step by step, and pushed to GitHub

content.title: Speaker Series: Bringing Industry to Campus
Research Groups: From Curiosity to Publication
Getting Started: Launch Your AI Hub
RAG from Scratch
content.description: Build a retrieval-augmented generation system from the ground up — load documents, embed them, search them, and generate grounded answers

content.title: Prompt Engineering Lab
content.description: A hands-on lab exploring prompt engineering techniques — from basic patterns to advanced strategies for reliable AI outputs

content.title: Build a Chatbot
content.description: Build a functional AI chatbot from scratch using Python and the OpenAI API, with a web interface you can share
